title: Air Fare - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Transportation > Air Fare 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ANGEL FLIGHT WEST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Arranges air travel through donated flights. Missions flown include non-emergency medical transport to far-off medical treatment, specialty camps, domestic violence relocation, assistance for military personnel, blood/organ/tissue donations, and disaster response. Trips also cover compassion-related reasons, including but not limited to travel to visit or provide care for a critically ill family member. The distance of travel is 101 miles minimum and 899 miles maximum. Requests must be submitted at least 7 days in advance and potential clients must have a physician's medical release to travel. Requests are accepted on a case-by-case basis and assistance is not guaranteed. 3161 Donald Douglas Loop S Santa Monica, CA 90405 Eligibility: Individuals who are medically stable and fully ambulatory with a financial, geographical, or other compelling reason for needing a donated flight Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (310) 390-2958 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MIRACLE FLIGHTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides commercial flights for children needing specialized medical care or second opinions not available in their local communities. Flights serve domestic US treatment facilities and support travel to retrieve service dogs or attend required training sessions. Children may be accompanied by up to two parents or legal guardians, and qualifying applicants can receive assistance as often as needed. 2764 N Green Valley Parkway Suite 115 Henderson, NV 89014 Eligibility: -Ages 0-17 -Must meet income criteria. Financial thresholds are based on household size and are generally three times the annual federal poverty guidelines listed by the US Department of Health and Human Services. -Requests must be made at least 14 days before the departure date Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-3pm Email (800) 359-1711 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
